title: Whole Cake Island Comes Into View
description: On pages 7–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Big Mom Pirates, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8 as The rescue team reaches Big Mom’s territory and learns how Sanji is trapped by family and political pressure.
scene: The Sanji retrieval team enters Big Mom’s sphere of influence, where every friendly face may be connected to the wedding trap.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Meanwhile, on whole cake island

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is bad! Mama's illness has reared its head again!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Quickly! What's the dish this time- soire?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Croguem- BOUCHE!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That decorative sweet made of piled cream puffs... that's a tall order!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Wait... I think, in the capital's hotel...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There is a group of cream puff tourists staying-je t'aine

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: They checked out just this morning.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So we've got no choice but to make it?! What have the chefs said?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I need to pay attention to the batter. Bring me some almonds.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Contact the Nuts Minister!

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom Pirates
dialogue.text: MAMA is currently heading for...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She's com- ing here?! This is the capital! Mama's castle is here too!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She's beyond help! She's lost herself in her fit of rage!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Casualties continue to rise!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Send an evacuation notice to sweet city!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Only a croquem- Bouche can stop Mama now!

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom Pirates
dialogue.text: Mama! Let's stop this!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Bring. Me. A. Cropuem- Bouche!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: She's arrived in sweet city!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is Mama's "Eating Disorder"! We're in Hot Water Now-Bon!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's no telling when her fits will come!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Till she puts in mouth whatever she wants to eat,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: She continues to destroy...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Just pick up the pace!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Crouembou^ Cheeeeeeee!

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom Pirates
dialogue.text: MAMA! Mama! You can't destroy this city!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: It's one of big mom's tantrums!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: In this city?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Kyaah!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: She might even bring down the castle!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: It's no use. She can't hear us.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Crap!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Where is it?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Kya!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Help me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Where is it?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: It's not this!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Not you either!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: It's none of these things!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: WAA- AAH!

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom Pirates
dialogue.text: Mama! Stop! We beg of you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Fuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuu

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Who are you?! Where is my croquem- Bouche?!

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom Pirates
dialogue.text: UWA! Mama! It's me! Muscat*!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Yes! It's Master Muscat!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The gelato minister! He's sure to figure out a way to...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Give us just 30 more minutes!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The chefs are working on it as we speak!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: 16th son of the Charlotte family Galato Minister Charlotte Muscat

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're wasting your time, mus! It's impossible to stop her when she gets like that!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So you are saying I should let her destroy the Capital?!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Approach storyline with 52 dialogue beats. The crew moves from Zou toward Big Mom’s territory and begins to understand the scale of Sanji’s predicament.
